gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Milestones" tile from the homepage
Then the user should see a page with a list of baseball games for today
And each game should show team names, game info, and an "Edit Milestones" button
For example:
Team Name | Game PK | Venue | Game Date | Status and Edit Milestone button on the right side of the game card
When the user clicks the "Edit Milestones" button for the first game in the list
Then the user should see a table showing existing milestones for that game
And the user should see an "Add Milestone" button at the top
When the user clicks the "Add Milestone" button
Then the user should see a popup window titled "Add Milestone"
And the user should see dropdown menus and input fields to fill out
When the user clicks on the "Milestone Type" dropdown
And the user selects "INNING_END" from the list of options
And the user types "11" in the inning number box
And the user clicks the checkbox next to "isTopInning" (to check it)
And the user clicks the checkbox next to "isGameOver" (to check it)
And the user clicks the timestamp toggle button
And the user clicks the calendar button
And the user picks the date "June 12 2024" from the calendar
And the user clicks the "Submit" button
Then the popup window should disappear
And the user should see a green success message saying "Insert Milestone Success"
When the user refreshes the webpage
Then the user should see their new milestone appears in the table
And it should show "INNING_END" and inning "11"
